tasks.name: Request the most affordable overnight nursing plan under $180 per night starting April 15
tasks.description: Find overnight home nursing plans, set the start date to April 15, 2026, limit the budget to $180 per night, sort by price, and request the cheapest plan shown. Success is reaching the request form for the lowest-priced plan that does not exceed $180 per night.
steps: Navigate to the website homepage.
Click on the "Services" option in the top navigation menu.
In the services menu, click on the "Overnight Care" service.
On the Overnight Care page, scroll to the pricing or plan calculator section.
In the start date field, open the date picker and select "April 15, 2026".
In the frequency dropdown, select "3 nights per week" from the available options.
In the budget or maximum price field/slider, enter "180" as the maximum nightly price.
Click the "Show Plans" or similar button to display overnight care plans that match the criteria.

In the results list, open the sort dropdown, select "Price: Low to High", then click the "Request Plan" (or equivalent call-to-action) button on the first plan card in the sorted list (the cheapest option under $180).

tasks.name: Shortlist two Spanish-speaking caregivers with 5+ years experience and 4.5+ rating within 10 miles of ZIP 94105
tasks.description: Search for caregivers near ZIP code 94105, filter for Spanish speakers with at least 5 years of experience and ratings of 4.5 stars or higher, then add the first two matching caregivers to your favorites list. Success is having exactly two caregivers that match these criteria added to favorites/shortlist.
steps: Navigate to the website homepage.
Click on the "Find a Caregiver" or "Caregivers" option in the main navigation.
In the location or ZIP code search field, type "94105" and confirm the location (e.g., by pressing Enter or clicking a search icon).
Locate the distance or radius filter and set it to "10 miles".
Open the filters panel and under the "Languages" section, select the checkbox for "Spanish".
In the same filters panel, find the "Experience" filter and choose the option "5+ years".
Locate the "Rating" filter and set the minimum rating to "4.5 stars".
Click the "Apply Filters" button to update the caregiver results list.
In the filtered results list, click the "Favorite" or "Save" icon on the first caregiver card, then do the same on the second caregiver card to add both to your favorites or shortlist.

tasks.name: Book the earliest available 2-hour post-surgery visit with a nurse specialized in wound care
tasks.description: Schedule a one-time home nursing visit for post-surgery care on a specific date, ensuring the nurse has wound care specialization and selecting the earliest available 2-hour time slot. Success is reaching the guest booking page with the earliest qualifying wound-care time slot selected.
steps: Navigate to the website homepage.
Click on the "Book a Visit" or similar primary booking button.
On the service selection step, choose the service category labeled "Post-Surgery Care" (or similar wording).
In the date picker, select the visit date "March 20, 2026".
In the visit duration dropdown, select "2 hours".
In the specialization or skills section, check the box for "Wound care".
Click the "Search Availability" or "See Time Slots" button to display available nurses and times.
On the availability results page, locate the list of time slots and click on the first (earliest) time slot shown for a wound-care nurse on March 20, 2026.
On the next page, select the "Book as Guest" or "Continue without account" option to proceed with the booking as a guest.

tasks.name: Choose the cheaper dementia care package that offers at least 3 visits per week and schedule a start date
tasks.description: Compare dementia care packages that provide at least 3 visits per week, select the one with the lower monthly price, and proceed to set a start date. Success is having the lower-priced qualifying package selected with a start date of April 1, 2026 chosen.
steps: Navigate to the website homepage.
Click on the "Services" option in the top navigation.
From the services list, select "Memory & Dementia Care".
On the Memory & Dementia Care page, scroll down to the section that lists care packages.
In the list of packages, locate the first two packages that show "3 visits/week" or more in their description, and click the "Compare" or comparison checkbox on each of those two packages.
Click the "Compare Selected" button to open the comparison view for those two packages.
On the comparison page, find the package with the lower monthly price and click the "Select Package" or equivalent button under that cheaper package.
On the subsequent scheduling step, open the date picker and select "April 1, 2026" as the start date.
Click the "Continue" or "Continue to Schedule" button to proceed with scheduling using the selected cheaper dementia care package.

tasks.name: Complete a needs assessment and schedule a phone consultation on March 10, 2026 at 3:00 PM
tasks.description: Use the online care needs assessment quiz, view the recommended services, and then schedule a phone consultation for March 10, 2026 at 3:00 PM. Success is reaching the confirmation step with a phone consultation selected for that exact date and time.
steps: Navigate to the website homepage.
Click on the "Get Care Recommendations" or "Start Assessment" banner or button (typically highlighted on the homepage).
On the first quiz question about how often help is needed, select the option labeled "A few times per week".
On the question about the main concern, select the option labeled "Managing medications".
On the question about mobility needs, select the option labeled "Needs some assistance".
After answering the questions, click the "View Recommended Services" or "See Recommendations" button.
On the recommendations page, click the button labeled "Schedule a Phone Consultation" (or similar).
In the consultation scheduler, use the date picker to select "March 10, 2026" and then choose the "3:00 PM" time slot from the list of available times.
Click the "Confirm Consultation" or "Book Consultation" button to finalize the phone consultation at 3:00 PM on March 10, 2026.

tasks.name: Save and copy the link to the most popular fall-prevention article from the last 12 months
tasks.description: Navigate to the resources section, filter for fall-prevention content published within the last 12 months, sort by popularity, open the top article, save it, and copy its shareable link. Success is having the most popular fall-prevention article from the last year saved and its link copied.
steps: Navigate to the website homepage.
Click on the "Resources" or "Blog" link in the main navigation menu.
On the resources page, click on the category or tag labeled "Safety & Fall Prevention".
Locate the date filter and set the filter range to show articles from the "Last 12 months".
Open the sort dropdown and select the option "Most Popular" or "Most Read".
Click on the first article in the sorted list (the most popular fall-prevention article from the last 12 months) to open its detail page.
On the article page, click the "Save" or "Bookmark" button to add the article to your saved resources.
In the article's share toolbar, click the "Copy Link" or "Copy URL" button to copy the article's shareable link.

tasks.name: Create a custom 10-hour weekly care plan with an estimated cost under $700 and submit an estimate request
tasks.description: Use the cost estimator to build a weekly care plan totaling 10 hours with a weekly estimated cost below $700, adjusting hours if needed, then submit your contact details. Success is submitting the estimate request form with a plan that totals 10 hours (or fewer if adjusted) and shows an estimated weekly total not exceeding $700.
steps: Navigate to the website homepage.
Click on the "Cost Estimator" or "Estimate My Care" link in the header or main navigation.
In the service selection area, add the service "Personal Care" and set its hours per week field to "5".
Add another service "Medication Reminders" and set its hours per week field to "3".
Add a third service "Household Support" and set its hours per week field to "2", bringing the total planned hours to 10 per week.
Look at the estimated weekly total displayed; if the total is above $700, decrease the "Household Support" hours per week field from "2" down to "1" to reduce the weekly cost.
After the hours are set, click the "Next: Contact Details" or similar button to move to the contact form step.
In the contact form, type "Alex Rivera" into the full name field, "alex@example.com" into the email field, and "555-123-4567" into the phone number field.
Click the "Submit Estimate Request" or equivalent button to send your custom care plan and contact details.

tasks.name: Reschedule an existing home visit to March 8, 2026 at 10:00 AM using the booking management tool
tasks.description: Access the booking management area using a confirmation number and last name, open an existing visit, and reschedule it to March 8, 2026 at 10:00 AM. Success is saving the updated appointment with that exact date and time.
steps: Navigate to the website homepage.
Click on the "Manage Bookings" or "My Visits" link in the header.
In the booking lookup form, type "HN123456" into the confirmation or booking number field.
Type "Morgan" into the last name field.
Click the "Find Booking" or "Search" button to open the booking details.
On the booking details page, click the "Reschedule" button associated with the existing home visit.
In the rescheduling interface, open the date picker and select "March 8, 2026".
From the available time slots on March 8, select the "10:00 AM" time slot.
Click the "Save New Time" or "Confirm Reschedule" button to update the visit to March 8, 2026 at 10:00 AM.
